application.name: spisis
application.brief: Rotate the camera pointing matrix associated with a cube.
application.description: Camrotate rotates the camera pointing matrix associated with a cube about the x, y, and z axes by specified amounts.

parameter.name: FROM
parameter.description: This is the cube containing the pointing information table to update.

parameter.name: HORIZONTAL
parameter.description: This is the angular offset to apply to the camera pointing matrix by rotating about the y-axis.

parameter.name: VERTICAL
parameter.description: This is the angular offset to apply to the camera pointing matrix by rotating about the x-axis.

parameter.name: TWIST
parameter.description: This is the amount to rotate the camera pointing matrix about the z-axis.
